mapper.select: SELECT * FROM korean_proverb WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY no
SELECT * FROM korean_proverb WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM korean_proverb WHERE no = #{no} AND is_active = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE korean_proverb SET question = #{question}, answer = #{answer}, option1 = #{option1}, option2 = #{option2}, option3 = #{option3}, option4 = #{option4}, meaning = #{meaning}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE no = #{no}
